scripts.dev: node -e "require('node:fs').mkdirSync('dist/client', { recursive: true })" && wrangler dev --var DEV:1
scripts.dev:e2e: bun run build && wrangler d1 migrations apply corvus --local && bun run dev -- --local --var TEST_AUTH_ENABLED:1 --var DEV:1
scripts.copy-assets: rm -rf dist/client && mkdir -p dist/client && cp -r ../web/.output/public/. dist/client/
scripts.deploy: node -e "require('node:fs').existsSync('dist/client/index.html') || (console.error('Refusing to deploy: dist/client/index.html is missing. Run bun run build from the repo root first.'), process.exit(1))" && wrangler d1 migrations apply corvus --remote && wrangler deploy && bun db:backfill-normalized-urls:remote
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply corvus --local && bun db:backfill-normalized-urls
